mapper.select: select r.*, c.content_text as content_title, c.content_text as content_text, c.anonymous_id as target_anonymous_id, cm.comment_text as comment_text, cm.anonymous_id as comment_anonymous_id from report r left join content c on r.target_type = 1 and r.target_id = c.id left join comment cm on r.target_type = 2 and r.target_id = cm.id where r.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update report
handle_status = #{handleStatus},
handle_time = #{handleTime},
handle_remark = #{handleRemark},
where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into report (target_type, target_id, anonymous_id, report_type, report_desc, handle_status, create_time) values (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{anonymousId}, #{reportType}, #{reportDesc}, #{handleStatus}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select count(*) from report where handle_status = #{status}
mapper.delete: delete from report where target_type = #{targetType} and target_id = #{targetId}
